author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: config_true_client_ip_spoofable
summary: Registers a fresh user, then probes /rest/saveLoginIp (and similar) with True-Client-IP / X-Forwarded-For / X-Real-IP / X-Originating-IP / CF-Connecting-IP set to canary values. Flags the endpoint when the stored audit-trail IP matches the spoofed value, demonstrating that authenticated callers can forge their own lastLoginIp record.
